header.label: Stage 6 Phase 4 — Ticket II (PS1 env-var refactor) + Ticket JJ (.mcp.json consistency)

scope.summary: Phase 4 closes two paired hardening tickets: - Ticket II (id 299, priority=3/HIGH): Refactor 5 PS1 fleet scripts from .mcp.json credential reads to direct $env:VARNAME pattern (Python parity per vikunja_mcp/cli.py). Also fixes la_merge_approve.ps1:189 trigger-path derivation bug (dynamic-path pattern, per LA option (b2)). - Ticket JJ (id 300, priority=2/MEDIUM): After II, edit BlarAI/.mcp.json VIKUNJA_PASS from literal to template format ("${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}"), making both .mcp.json files consistent. .mcp.json is gitignored — this is a local file edit only, no git commit.

ticket_ii.title: Stage 6.7.5 Ticket II: Refactor 5 PS1 scripts to direct env-var credential pattern
ticket_ii.acceptance: All 5 scripts read VIKUNJA_URL / VIKUNJA_USER / VIKUNJA_PASS via $env:VARNAME directly. No script reads credentials from .mcp.json after this change.

ticket_jj.title: Stage 6.7.5 Ticket JJ: devplatform/.mcp.json template consistency check
ticket_jj.acceptance: BlarAI/.mcp.json VIKUNJA_PASS = "${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}" (template). devplatform/.mcp.json already uses template format. Both files now consistent.
ticket_jj.note: BlarAI/.mcp.json is gitignored. This is a local file edit only — no git commit. Verification is confirming env var is set and login still works.

background.a16_summary: STATUS.md §5 entry A16 (lines 228-234): When Stage 4 Phase C applied the F-1 fix (devplatform/.mcp.json VIKUNJA_PASS → template format), 5 PS1 scripts that read .mcp.json via ConvertFrom-Json received the literal string "${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}" as the password — Vikunja login failed code 1011. Emergency fix reverted BlarAI/.mcp.json to literal. PS1 scripts read BlarAI's .mcp.json (via $RepoRoot default = C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI). Follow-up: Tickets II + JJ.
background.current_mcp_json_state: BlarAI/.mcp.json: VIKUNJA_PASS = "" (literal, plaintext) devplatform/.mcp.json: VIKUNJA_PASS = "${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}" (template, expanded by VS Code)
background.credential_source: VIKUNJA_URL, VIKUNJA_USER, VIKUNJA_PASS are set as User-scope Windows environment variables on this machine (provisioned at fleet-install time). They are already present in the process environment — $env:VIKUNJA_PASS returns the actual password without any expansion step needed in PowerShell.
background.python_model: vikunja_mcp/cli.py (lines 8-10): "Auth resolution order: 1. Environment variables: VIKUNJA_USER, VIKUNJA_PASS, VIKUNJA_URL 2. .env file in workspace root (gitignored)" Python reads os.environ directly. Ticket II brings PS1 scripts to parity.
background.la_merge_approve_trigger_path_bug:
la_merge_approve.ps1 line 189 (current): $triggerDir = Join-Path $RepoRoot 'tools\scheduled-tasks\triggers' $RepoRoot defaults to C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI. So the trigger file is written to BlarAI/tools/scheduled-tasks/triggers/co_lead_architect.wake.
But wake_launcher.ps1 (line 300) reads: $triggerDir = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'triggers' $PSScriptRoot = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\scheduled-tasks → wake_launcher reads from devplatform/.../triggers/
The trigger file written by la_merge_approve ends up in the WRONG repo and wake_launcher never sees it. Fix: change line 189 to $PSScriptRoot-based derivation (same pattern as wake_launcher's A19 fix at lines 69+809).

comprehension_gate.instruction: Before doing any work, respond with a comprehension gate covering exactly these items. Stop after the gate. Wait for Guide to issue APPROVED before proceeding.

items.item: State the two Vikunja ticket IDs and titles you are closing in this phase. State which ticket is the primary code-change work and which is the consistency-check follow-on.

Describe the credential-pattern change in concrete PowerShell terms: what block of code is being REMOVED from each script (pattern, not full text), and what THREE lines replace it. State the variable names ($vikUrl, $vikUser, $vikPass) and their new source ($env:...).

Describe the la_merge_approve.ps1:189 trigger-path bug: why does the current code write the trigger to the wrong location, and what is the one-line fix? Name the variable being substituted ($RepoRoot → $PSScriptRoot) and explain the consequence if the bug were left unfixed (wake_launcher never sees the trigger file).

Describe the wake_launcher.ps1 change: which function contains the credential block, what parameter is being removed from the function signature, what line is the only call site, and confirm it does NOT pass -McpConfigPath (so removing the parameter is safe).

Describe the JJ deliverable: what file is being changed, what single field is changing, from what value to what value. Confirm it is gitignored (no git commit). What is the verification step to confirm JJ is complete?

State the pre-flight env-var check command (PowerShell one-liner) that EA must run before editing any file to confirm VIKUNJA_URL, VIKUNJA_USER, VIKUNJA_PASS are all non-null in the current session. If any is null, EA must HARD STOP.

State the commit plan: branch name, how many commits, which repo each commit lands in, and what the A33 workaround is for closing Vikunja tasks (Option B steps). Confirm .mcp.json changes are NOT committed (gitignored).

State the fail-open vs fail-closed semantics for each of the 5 scripts post-refactor (what happens if env vars are missing at runtime). Identify which script must be fail-open (because missing work-gate auth = safe to fire Claude) vs which scripts can fail silently (exit 0).

preflight.check: Read C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json. Confirm fleet_paused=false before proceeding to pause. If fleet_paused=true: HARD STOP — report to Guide.

BlarAI repo (C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI): Run: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI" tag --list EXPECT exactly these 2 platform-extraction tags (among others): pre-platform-extract post-platform-extract If either is absent: HARD STOP. NOTE: 'platform-extracted' is NOT a BlarAI tag — it is a devplatform tag. Do NOT fail on its absence from BlarAI.
devplatform repo (C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform): Run: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform" tag --list EXPECT: platform-extracted (present at commit ae75507) If absent: HARD STOP.

check.label: Env var verification (MANDATORY — HARD STOP if any null)

preflight.check:
Run a test login using the env vars to confirm credentials work: $loginBody = @{ username = $env:VIKUNJA_USER; password = $env:VIKUNJA_PASS } | ConvertTo-Json $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$env:VIKUNJA_URL/api/v1/login" -Method Post -Body $loginBody -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 10 Write-Host "Login OK, token prefix: $($resp.token.Substring(0,8))..."
If login fails: HARD STOP. Report to Guide — env vars may be set but stale/wrong.
preflight.fleet_pause:
Pause the fleet using the Python helper (preferred): python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Stage 6 Phase 4 Tickets II+JJ', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
Commit immediately in devplatform (on main, before branching): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 4 Tickets II+JJ"
preflight.tracking_task: Create a Phase 4 tracking task in Vikunja Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta): Title: "Stage 6.7.5 Phase 4 tracking: Tickets II+JJ (PS1 env-var refactor + mcp.json consistency)" Priority: 3 Labels: Active (id 1), Infrastructure (id 5) Add a comment: "[agent:ea_code][phase:start] Phase 4 execution started. Scope: Ticket II (299) + JJ (300). Pre-flight checks passed." Record the new tracking task ID — needed for PF1 bifurcation at close.

execution.branch_setup: Create and checkout a feature branch in devplatform: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform checkout -b feat/stage6-phase4-ps1-env-var-refactor

edit.instruction:
PART A — Credential block:
REMOVE the McpConfigPath derivation (lines ~44-47): # Stage 2.5 g5-9: derive $McpConfigPath from $RepoRoot so that callers passing # `-BlarAIRoot 'C:\path\to\other-project'` get that project's .mcp.json, # not BlarAI's. (WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md Section 3 G-1 fix #1.) $McpConfigPath = Join-Path $RepoRoot '.mcp.json' (Remove all 4 lines entirely — the comment explains .mcp.json derivation which is obsolete.)
UPDATE the prerequisite comment at line ~24: OLD: "# - .mcp.json at repo root contains Vikunja credentials" NEW: "# - VIKUNJA_URL, VIKUNJA_USER, VIKUNJA_PASS env vars set (User-scope)"
REPLACE Step 2 Vikunja auth block (lines ~86-107, Test-Path + ConvertFrom-Json block): OLD pattern: # Step 2: Vikunja auth Write-Step 'Vikunja: auth' if (-not (Test-Path $McpConfigPath)) { Write-Fail ".mcp.json not found at $McpConfigPath. Merge succeeded ($mergeCommit); Vikunja labels need manual fixup." exit 2 } try { $mcp = Get-Content $McpConfigPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json $vikEnv = $mcp.mcpServers.vikunja.env $vikUrl = $vikEnv.VIKUNJA_URL $vikUser = $vikEnv.VIKUNJA_USER $vikPass = $vikEnv.VIKUNJA_PASS $loginBody = @{ username = $vikUser; password = $vikPass } | ConvertTo-Json $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$vikUrl/api/v1/login" -Method Post -Body $loginBody -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 10 $token = $loginResp.token $authHeaders = @{ 'Authorization' = "Bearer $token"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' } Write-Ok "logged in as $vikUser" } catch { Write-Fail "Vikunja auth failed: $_. Merge succeeded ($mergeCommit); labels need manual fixup." exit 3 }
NEW: # Step 2: Vikunja auth Write-Step 'Vikunja: auth' $vikUrl = $env:VIKUNJA_URL $vikUser = $env:VIKUNJA_USER $vikPass = $env:VIKUNJA_PASS if (-not $vikUrl -or -not $vikUser -or -not $vikPass) { Write-Fail "VIKUNJA_URL / VIKUNJA_USER / VIKUNJA_PASS env vars not set. Merge succeeded ($mergeCommit); Vikunja labels need manual fixup." exit 2 } try { $loginBody = @{ username = $vikUser; password = $vikPass } | ConvertTo-Json $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$vikUrl/api/v1/login" -Method Post -Body $loginBody -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 10 $token = $loginResp.token $authHeaders = @{ 'Authorization' = "Bearer $token"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' } Write-Ok "logged in as $vikUser" } catch { Write-Fail "Vikunja auth failed: $_. Merge succeeded ($mergeCommit); labels need manual fixup." exit 3 }
PART B — Trigger path fix (dynamic-path bug, line ~189): OLD: $triggerDir = Join-Path $RepoRoot 'tools\scheduled-tasks\triggers' NEW: $triggerDir = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'triggers'
Rationale: la_merge_approve.ps1 lives at devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/. $PSScriptRoot = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\scheduled-tasks. wake_launcher.ps1 reads triggers from $PSScriptRoot\triggers\ (its own PSScriptRoot). Old code wrote to BlarAI/.../triggers/ → wake_launcher never found the file.

verification.label: No remaining .mcp.json credential reads in 5 scripts

execution.verification:
Run: $pattern = 'mcpServers|ConvertFrom-Json.*mcp|\.mcp\.json|McpConfigPath' Get-ChildItem C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\scheduled-tasks -Filter '*.ps1' | Select-String -Pattern $pattern | Where-Object { $_.Filename -in @('agents-cadence-monitor.ps1','escalation_watchdog.ps1','la_merge_approve.ps1','test_async_post_gate.ps1','wake_launcher.ps1') }
EXPECT: zero matches. If any matches remain: fix them before committing.

verification.label: Vikunja login still works from PowerShell env vars

execution.verification:
Run the same login smoke test from Check 0d: $loginBody = @{ username = $env:VIKUNJA_USER; password = $env:VIKUNJA_PASS } | ConvertTo-Json $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$env:VIKUNJA_URL/api/v1/login" -Method Post -Body $loginBody -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 10 Write-Host "Login OK: $($resp.token.Substring(0,8))..."
EXPECT: success. If fails: HARD STOP.
execution.commit:
Stage exactly the 5 edited files (explicit-add): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/scheduled-tasks/agents-cadence-monitor.ps1 git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/scheduled-tasks/escalation_watchdog.ps1 git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/scheduled-tasks/la_merge_approve.ps1 git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/scheduled-tasks/test_async_post_gate.ps1 git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/scheduled-tasks/wake_launcher.ps1
Commit message (use heredoc): "refactor(fleet-ps1): Ticket II -- direct env-var creds, 5 PS1 scripts; la_merge_approve:189 trigger path fix"
Do NOT use git add . or git add -A. Only the 5 named files.

edit.instruction:
Change the VIKUNJA_PASS value in C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\.mcp.json: OLD: "VIKUNJA_PASS": "" NEW: "VIKUNJA_PASS": "${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}"
This makes BlarAI/.mcp.json consistent with devplatform/.mcp.json. VIKUNJA_URL and VIKUNJA_USER stay as literals (non-secret values).
IMPORTANT: .mcp.json is gitignored in BlarAI. Do NOT stage or commit this file. Verify it is gitignored: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI check-ignore -v .mcp.json EXPECT: .gitignore line listed. If not gitignored: HARD STOP — report to Guide.

verification.label: JJ verification — template value present, env var is set

execution.verification:
1. Confirm the edit landed: Select-String -Path C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\.mcp.json -Pattern 'VIKUNJA_PASS' EXPECT: matches "${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}" (not the literal password)
2. Confirm the env var is set (so MCP server gets the actual value): Write-Host "VIKUNJA_PASS set: $($null -ne $env:VIKUNJA_PASS -and $env:VIKUNJA_PASS.Length -gt 0)" EXPECT: True
3. Confirm BlarAI file is NOT staged: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI status --short .mcp.json EXPECT: empty output (file is gitignored, not staged)

vikunja_close.label: Close Ticket II (id 299) — A33 Option B

execution.vikunja_close: A33 bug: mcp__vikunja__complete_task zeroes absent fields. Use Option B: 1. get_task(task_id=299) — capture title, description, priority 2. update_task(task_id=299, title=<captured>, description=<captured>, priority=<captured>, done=True) 3. add_task_comment(task_id=299, comment="[agent:ea_code][phase:completion] Ticket II complete. 5 PS1 scripts refactored to direct env-var credential pattern. la_merge_approve.ps1:189 trigger path fixed ($PSScriptRoot-based). Verification: V1 (no .mcp.json reads), V2 (login OK). devplatform commit: <SHA of C1>")

vikunja_close.label: Close Ticket JJ (id 300) — A33 Option B

execution.vikunja_close: 1. get_task(task_id=300) — capture title, description, priority 2. update_task(task_id=300, title=<captured>, description=<captured>, priority=<captured>, done=True) 3. add_task_comment(task_id=300, comment="[agent:ea_code][phase:completion] Ticket JJ complete. BlarAI/.mcp.json VIKUNJA_PASS changed from literal to template format. Both .mcp.json files (BlarAI + devplatform) now use ${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}. Verification: V3 (template present, env var set, file not staged).")

edit.instruction:
1. Update Stage 6 table row (find the Phase 3 row and add Phase 4): Add column entries for Phase 4: devplatform commit SHA(s), BlarAI commit SHA(s). (No BlarAI git commit for this phase — JJ is gitignored file only.)
2. Append evolution entry E12 to the Stage 6 evolution log section: "Stage 6 Phase 4 (Tickets II+JJ) complete. II: 5 PS1 fleet scripts refactored to direct VIKUNJA_URL/USER/PASS env-var credential pattern (Python parity). la_merge_approve.ps1:189 trigger path fixed ($PSScriptRoot-based, was $RepoRoot — trigger now writes to devplatform/.../triggers/ where wake_launcher reads it). JJ: BlarAI/.mcp.json VIKUNJA_PASS → template format; both .mcp.json files consistent. Backlog: 40 total / 20 done / 20 open after Phase 4 tracking task close."
Commit in BlarAI (on main — no feature branch needed for STATUS.md): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI add docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI commit -m "docs(stage6_phase4): record Phase 4 complete in STATUS.md (E12)"

execution.merge:
In devplatform, merge the feature branch to main (no-ff): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform checkout main git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform merge --no-ff feat/stage6-phase4-ps1-env-var-refactor -m "feat(fleet-ps1): Stage 6 Phase 4 -- direct env-var creds + trigger path fix (Tickets II+JJ)"
Record the merge commit SHA — needed for close report.
execution.fleet_unpause:
Unpause using the Python helper (the function is resume_fleet, NOT unpause_fleet): python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
Commit in devplatform (on main): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 4 complete"
execution.pf1_bifurcation:
PF1 = Phase 4 tracking task created at pre-flight.
PASS path (all edits complete, V1+V2+V3 passed, II+JJ tickets closed, STATUS.md committed, merge done, fleet unpaused): Close tracking task via A33 Option B: get_task → update_task(done=True, fields preserved) → add_task_comment with Phase 4 summary
HARD STOP path (any verification check failed before completion): Add comment to tracking task summarizing what failed and current state. Do NOT close tracking task (leave done=false). Per AOAM §4: "On failure, comment with summary — do NOT mark complete."

ea_dispatch.close_report_format:
At completion, produce a close report covering: 1. Phase 4 PASS / HARD STOP verdict 2. Pre-flight results (Check 0a/0b/0c/0d) 3. Edits per script (lines changed, before/after summary for each of 5 scripts) 4. V1 verification result (no .mcp.json reads) 5. V2 verification result (login smoke test) 6. V3 verification result (JJ .mcp.json template check) 7. Commit SHAs: devplatform pause commit, devplatform C1 commit, devplatform merge commit, devplatform unpause commit, BlarAI STATUS.md commit 8. Vikunja state: II (299) done=?, JJ (300) done=?, tracking task done=? 9. Backlog: total / done / open
Write report to: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\temp_for_responses\6.7.5-EA_INSTANCE_13_STAGE6_PHASE_4_CLOSE_REPORT.md Then post a SHORT summary (5-10 lines) to chat.

constraints.constraint: complete_task MCP tool is SUSPENDED due to A33 data-loss bug (Ticket WW id 318). Always use Option B: get_task → update_task(task_id, title, description, priority, done=True). Never call mcp__vikunja__complete_task for any task in this phase.

These frozen verdict files must NOT be edited under any circumstances (no-amend doctrine): docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.2.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_2_V2_RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED_SELECTIVE_COPY_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml

All git add commands must name files explicitly. Never use git add . or git add -A. This prevents accidental staging of sensitive files (.env, credentials.env, .mcp.json, state.json when not intended).
BlarAI/.mcp.json is gitignored. Never stage or commit it. Verify with: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI check-ignore -v .mcp.json

PS1 script edits go on feat/stage6-phase4-ps1-env-var-refactor branch in devplatform. STATUS.md update goes directly to BlarAI main (consistent with prior phases). Merge devplatform feature branch to main after all edits, verifications, and ticket closures.

exclusions.item: VV (317): cross-repo path resolution audit + smoke tests — Phase 5, not this phase.
WW (318): complete_task MCP bug fix — standing open ticket, not this phase.
GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml: any updates to subagent_verification_protocol.md reference are Co-Lead scope at next Guide transition, not EA scope.
Any other hardening backlog ticket not named above.

acknowledgements.ack: Fleet-pause SOP: pause_fleet(...) + commit BEFORE any branch checkout or multi-file edit; resume_fleet(...) (NOT unpause_fleet — AttributeError) + commit as LAST action. Mandatory for this phase (multi-file edits across 5 scripts).
Explicit-add discipline: all git add commands name files explicitly. Never git add . or git add -A. No exceptions, including during unpause commit.

A33 workaround: mcp__vikunja__complete_task is SUSPENDED. Use Option B for all task closures: get_task → update_task(done=True, title preserved, description preserved, priority preserved). This applies to Tickets II (299), JJ (300), and the Phase 4 tracking task.

Check 0b is two-repo: BlarAI has exactly 2 extraction tags (pre-platform-extract + post-platform-extract). devplatform has platform-extracted at ae75507. Absence of platform-extracted from BlarAI is NOT a defect — it was always a devplatform tag.
No-amend doctrine: the 4 frozen verdict files (3.0.v2, 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10) must not be edited or amended under any circumstances.

Pre-flight env-var check is MANDATORY and must run BEFORE any file edit. If any of VIKUNJA_URL, VIKUNJA_USER, VIKUNJA_PASS is null: HARD STOP. These env vars come from User-scope Windows environment (provisioned at fleet-install). They are the sole credential source after Ticket II removes .mcp.json dependency.

la_merge_approve.ps1:189 trigger-path fix is part of Ticket II scope (LA option b2). Old: Join-Path $RepoRoot 'tools\scheduled-tasks\triggers' → writes to BlarAI, never found by wake_launcher. New: Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'triggers' → writes to devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/triggers/ where wake_launcher reads it.
PF1 bifurcation per AOAM §4: PASS path = close tracking task (done=True via Option B); HARD STOP path = add comment with failure summary, leave tracking task open (done=false).

JJ produces no git commit. BlarAI/.mcp.json is gitignored. Completion evidence is V3 verification (template string present, env var set, file not staged in git). JJ is closed in Vikunja (Option B) after V3 passes, not after a git commit.

guide_verification.note: Guide-#10 independently verifies ALL of the following after EA close report is received.
guide_verification.check: devplatform: git log --oneline HEAD shows unpause commit → merge commit → C1 commit → pause commit (in reverse chronological order)
devplatform: git show <C1_SHA> -- tools/scheduled-tasks/*.ps1 (5 files changed, no .mcp.json reads remain)
devplatform: git show <C1_SHA> -- tools/scheduled-tasks/la_merge_approve.ps1 shows PSScriptRoot on the trigger path line
devplatform: git show <C1_SHA> -- tools/scheduled-tasks/wake_launcher.ps1 shows $McpConfigPath parameter removed and env var block present
BlarAI: git log --oneline HEAD shows STATUS.md commit
BlarAI: git show <STATUS_SHA> -- docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md shows E12 entry
Vikunja: project_summary shows 40 total / 20 done / 20 open
guide_verification.backlog_expectation: Before Phase 4: 39 total / 17 done / 22 open Phase 4 adds: tracking task (+1 total/+1 done once closed), closes II+JJ (+2 done) After Phase 4: 40 total / 20 done / 20 open
